old_value: {"id":"strata-axb","title":"Delta checkpoint support","description":"PATCH .../checkpoint/delta: Accept PatchUpdateCheckpointDeltaRequest with textual diff + checkpointHash (SHA256). Apply byte-offset delta to last-persisted checkpoint. Verify hash before and after. Advertise delta-checkpoint-uploads-v2 capability in GET /api/capabilities. Critical for states \u003e1MB where CLI defaults to deltas. Reference: hatemosphere's internal/engine/delta.go for applyDelta logic.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"639682+omercnet@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T08:49:14Z","created_by":"Omer C","updated_at":"2026-03-06T08:49:14Z"}

new_value: {"description":"Self-hosted Pulumi backend targeting production-viable horizontal scalability. Architecture: stateless HTTP controllers (no in-memory caches, no local-only state), all mutable state in PostgreSQL, pg advisory locks for background workers, transactions for critical sections, unique indexes to prevent race conditions. Supports clustering out of the box — run N replicas behind a load balancer with shared Postgres + S3 blob storage. Phase 5 delivers: cancel updates, orphan GC (pg advisory locks), delta checkpoints (bandwidth optimization for large states \u003e1MB), idempotency framework (retry-safe mutations via request dedup), and Tier 2 endpoints (update history, tags, CLI version check). Milestone: production-viable multi-node deployment."}
old_value: {"id":"strata-cq9","title":"Phase 5: Resilience","description":"Cancel updates, orphan GC, delta checkpoints, gzip, idempotency, Tier 2 endpoints. Milestone: production-viable.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"639682+omercnet@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T08:47:43Z","created_by":"Omer C","updated_at":"2026-03-06T08:47:43Z"}

old_value: {"id":"strata-wk2","title":"Idempotency framework for mutating endpoints","description":"CLI retries aggressively (1s initial, 2x backoff, 30s max, 4 retries, retryAllMethods on checkpoints). All mutating endpoints must be idempotent. Implement request_dedup table keyed by (scope, idempotency_key). For checkpoint PATCH: use sequenceNumber. For other mutations: derive key from (update_uuid, route, sequence). Return cached response on replay.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"639682+omercnet@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T08:49:24Z","created_by":"Omer C","updated_at":"2026-03-06T08:49:24Z"}
